title: NIT Warangal – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./Master's/M.S Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Warangal official website.

age_limit.age_details: 32 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities)

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./Master's/M.S. in relevant fields

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
